name: cardiosense-app
description: CardioSense - ML-powered Cardiac Arrhythmia Detection Application

scripts.dev: cd front-end && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.build: cd front-end && npm install && npm run build
scripts.preview: cd front-end && npm run build && npm start
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd front-end && npm install
scripts.setup: npm install && cd front-end && npm install

author: CardioSense Team
